creator: antumdeluge@gmail.com
text:
Some updates for the X11 desktop LXDE (x11/lxde-meta)

x11/menu-cache: 0.5.1_2 -> 0.6.0
x11-wx/lxsession: 0.4.6.1_2 -> 0.4.9.2

CC'd maintaner.

Also, there are some components listed on the SF site that don't appear in ports. Perhaps some of these are deprecated or included within other ports but I will mention them here:

lxnm: Network manager for LXDE (probably included in x11/lxpanel).
  http://sourceforge.net/projects/lxde/files/LXNM%20%28network%20manager%29/

lxsession-edit: Manage desktop session autostarts.
  http://sourceforge.net/projects/lxde/files/LXSession%20Edit/

lxpolkit: PolicyKit authentication agent.
  http://sourceforge.net/projects/lxde/files/LXPolkit/

lxdm: GUI login manager for LXDE.
  http://sourceforge.net/projects/lxde/files/lxdm/

lxappearance-obconf: OpenBox Window Manager configuration tool (Looks like it may be the same as x11-wm/obconf but version is different. Perhaps is reworked for LXDE or is included in x11/lxde-common?).
  http://sourceforge.net/projects/lxde/files/LXAppearance%20Obconf/
